Golden fixtures for packet and ML regression coverage.

- `layered_sample.pdf`: one-page PDF with real OCG layers for dimension, bend, and title content.
- `layer_zero_sample.pdf`: one-page PDF with a visible layer and a `0 (ANSI)` layer for suppression checks.
- `order_1.pdf`, `order_2.pdf`, `order_10.pdf`: simple one-page PDFs used to verify Windows-style packet ordering.
- `profile_sample.dxf`: small synthetic profile with an outer contour, one circular void, one arc, and one open interior polyline.
- `golden_features.json`: expected signal values from `ml_pipeline.compute_phase2_signals()` for the committed PDF + DXF fixture pair.
